mdx.excerpt:
gist-pdf While I was writing GitHub Gists for my Docker and Kubernetes teaching notes, I
kept wishing my students had a clean, offline copy…

frontmatter.title: gist-pdf
frontmatter.description: A tool I built to turn GitHub Gists into clean PDFs, then packaged it properly for Homebrew, APT, Cargo, and Docker.
frontmatter.bannercaption: brew install gist-pdf, then convert any Gist to a PDF
